time_rhythm.note: 此为原子性任务，预计在短时间内完成

decomposition_rule.rule_name: 蒙古帝国逐级1:10分解口径
decomposition_rule.description: 每个上级单位负责管理和分解其任务给10个下级单位，确保任务逐级细化和执行。

levels.万户 (Tumen): 负责整体任务的接收、高级规划与最终结果的汇总。
levels.千户 (Mingghan): 负责将万户级任务分解为10个子任务，并分配给百户，同时协调资源。
levels.百户 (Jagun): 负责将千户级任务进一步分解为10个更小的执行单元，并监督十户的执行。
levels.十户 (Arban): 负责最小粒度任务的直接执行与初步结果的产出。

decomposition_rule.application_note: 对于原子性任务（如单个Logo识别），此分解规则为概念性框架。实际执行可能由单一十户级单元直接完成，但其产出仍需遵循逐级上报原则，并作为其所在百户、千户、万户任务的一部分。

reporting_cycle.cycle_name: 任务完成即时上报与定期汇总
reporting_cycle.frequency: 原子性任务：完成即时上报；多阶段/长期任务：每日/每周定期上报。
reporting_cycle.reporting_path: 十户 -> 百户 -> 千户 -> 万户
reporting_cycle.note: 确保各级报告内容一致性，并向上级提供所需决策信息。

report stating the identified company.

This decomposition is at a conceptual level, suitable for the "tumen_level_execute" role, and provides 10 distinct sub-tasks for the "mingghan_level_execute" to handle.

The `summary` will be `"[执行中] 正在分解万户任务至千户级..."`.
The `updates.progress` will be `0% (Decomposition complete, awaiting mingghan execution)`.
The `updates.risks` will be `None identified at this decomposition stage.`.<summary>[执行中] 正在分解万户任务至千户级，已完成子任务分配。</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[执行中] 正在分解万户任务至千户级，已完成子任务分配。",
  "updates": {
    "mingghan_allocations": [
      "Image Acquisition & Validation: Ensure the image file is accessible and valid for processing.",
      "Logo Region Detection: Automatically or semi-automatically identify the primary logo area within the image.",
      "Visual Feature Extraction: Extract distinctive visual features (e.g., colors, shapes, typography) from the detected logo.",
      "Initial Logo Search: Perform a broad search using extracted features to find potential matches or similar logos.",
      "Candidate Company Identification: From search results, identify a list of candidate companies associated with similar logos.",
      "DeepSeek Specific Matching: Prioritize and verify if any candidate logo strongly matches known DeepSeek branding.",
      "Textual Information Extraction: If applicable, extract any text embedded within or near the logo for further clues.",
      "External Information Cross-referencing: Use web search or other resources to cross-reference candidate companies with the logo's visual characteristics.",
      "Confidence Score Assessment: Evaluate the confidence level of the identified company-logo pairing.",
      "Final Identification Report Generation: Compile all findings into a conclusive report stating the identified company."
    ],
    "progress": "0% (Decomposition complete, awaiting mingghan execution)",
    "risks": "None identified at this decomposition stage."
  }
}
```

mingghan_allocations: Image Acquisition & Validation: Ensure the image file is accessible and valid for processing.
Logo Region Detection: Automatically or semi-automatically identify the primary logo area within the image.
Visual Feature Extraction: Extract distinctive visual features (e.g., colors, shapes, typography) from the detected logo.
Initial Logo Search: Perform a broad search using extracted features to find potential matches or similar logos.
Candidate Company Identification: From search results, identify a list of candidate companies associated with similar logos.
DeepSeek Specific Matching: Prioritize and verify if any candidate logo strongly matches known DeepSeek branding.
Textual Information Extraction: If applicable, extract any text embedded within or near the logo for further clues.
External Information Cross-referencing: Use web search or other resources to cross-reference candidate companies with the logo's visual characteristics.
Confidence Score Assessment: Evaluate the confidence level of the identified company-logo pairing.
Final Identification Report Generation: Compile all findings into a conclusive report stating the identified company.
updates.risks: None identified at this decomposition stage.

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 正在分解千户任务至百户级。

jaghun_allocations.task_description: 接收千户级任务指令，确认图片路径 'fixtures/media/image.jpg' 及识别目标。
调用 `caption_describe_image` 工具，获取 'fixtures/media/image.jpg' 的详细图像描述。
分析图像描述，提取关键视觉元素（如文字、图形、颜色、风格等），为网络搜索做准备。
基于提取的视觉元素，构建初步的网络搜索查询词，以寻找可能的公司或品牌名称。
调用 `web_search` 工具，执行初步查询，获取相关的网页搜索结果片段。
评估搜索结果，识别与图像描述高度匹配的潜在公司或品牌名称作为候选。
若有多个候选或需进一步验证，则细化搜索查询或使用 `web_fetch` 获取相关网页内容以收集更多信息。
将图片中的视觉特征与从网络获取的候选公司/品牌信息进行交叉比对，确认一致性。
根据所有收集和比对的信息，最终确认该Logo所属的公司名称。
准备并输出Logo识别结果报告，明确指出公司名称及支持证据。

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 百户任务已分解为十个十户子任务，并已完成动员分配，本阶段任务已完成，等待进入下一阶段。

arban_allocations.title: Arban 1: Image Description Generation
arban_allocations.description: Use the 'caption_describe_image' tool on 'fixtures/media/image.jpg' to generate a detailed text caption of the logo.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 2: Initial Keyword Extraction
arban_allocations.description: Extract primary keywords and potential company names from the generated image description for search queries.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 3: Web Search - Primary Keywords
arban_allocations.description: Execute a web search using the primary keywords extracted in Arban 2 to find potential company matches for the logo.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 4: Web Search - Secondary Keywords
arban_allocations.description: Execute a web search using alternative or refined keywords related to the logo's appearance or industry, if the primary search is insufficient.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 5: Web Search - Logo Identification Terms
arban_allocations.description: Perform a web search combining elements from the image description with general logo identification terms (e.g., 'logo identification', 'company emblem').

arban_allocations.title: Arban 6: Search Result Analysis - Initial Scan
arban_allocations.description: Analyze the snippets from web search results from Arban 3, 4, and 5 to identify promising links or direct answers.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 7: Webpage Content Fetch - Candidate 1
arban_allocations.description: Fetch the full content of the most promising webpage URL identified in Arban 6 using 'web_fetch'.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 8: Webpage Content Fetch - Candidate 2
arban_allocations.description: Fetch the full content of a second promising webpage URL for cross-verification using 'web_fetch'.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 9: Information Synthesis & Identification
arban_allocations.description: Synthesize all collected information (image description, search results, webpage content) to definitively identify the company owning the logo.

arban_allocations.title: Arban 10: Confidence Assessment & Reporting
arban_allocations.description: Assess the confidence level of the logo identification and prepare a concise report of the findings.

updates.readiness: All ten arban leaders are mobilized and ready to execute their assigned sub-tasks.

````text
{
  "question": "我已多次尝试按照 `Topology Contract` 的要求，以JSON格式提交本阶段的执行结果（报告了任务与角色职责冲突），但系统持续返回 `回复为空` 和 `遗漏了<summary>` 的错误。请问在不调用其他工具的情况下，我应该如何正确地提交阶段性的JSON输出，以便系统能够识别并接受我的回复？"
````
